subtitle.ja: 両手の親指に糸をかけて始めます。左右の小指で、手のひらの2本の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: Begin with the string on both thumbs. With both little fingers, pick up the two palm strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指で、反対側の手のひらの2本の糸を取り合います
subtitle.en: With both index fingers, pick up the two palm strings of the opposite hand.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指で、人差し指手前の2本の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, pick up the two near index-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指にかかっている上の2本の糸を残したまま、下の1本の糸だけを外します
subtitle.en: Leaving the upper two strings on both thumbs in place, remove only the lower single string.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指の糸を全て外します。両手を開いて中央の結び目を絞めます。
subtitle.en: Remove all strings from both index fingers. Open both hands to tighten the central knot.

subtitle.ja: 左手の糸を全て外し、右手小指の輪を左手で持ちます。右手の糸を全て外して完成です
subtitle.en: Remove all strings from the left hand and, with the left hand, hold the loop on the right little finger. Remove all strings from the right hand to finish.

subtitle.ja: 左手の輪に右手を入れ、輪を切るように両手を広げます
subtitle.en: Insert the right hand into the loop on the left hand and spread both hands apart, cutting the loop.
